headline: MoneyLion Launches Summer Break Giveaway to Give Consumers a Much-Needed Financial Breather
summary: According to a new MoneyLion in-app survey, summer spending has a way of getting ahead of even the best-laid plans. Nearly half of consumers (47%) say family activities and BBQs are the summer moments they're most likely to overspend on even when budgets are tight, and more than a third (35%) expect weekend trips to cost more than they budgeted. To help ease the financial pressure that comes with the season, MoneyLion is launching its Summer Break Giveaway, awarding $500 to two winners every day
